assertions.summary: GET /simple/price?vs_currencies=usd returned HTTP 400 with the exact invalid_parameter envelope required by the contract on a fresh port-3102 rerun.

evidence.description: fresh-rerun-summary.json includes HTTP 400 and exact {error,message} body for the missing-selector request.

assertions.summary: Fresh port-3102 rerun showed stable repeated page-1 ids, disjoint page-2 ids, monotonic market_cap_rank ordering, correct filtered ids, omitted sparkline_in_7d when sparkline=false, and populated sparkline_in_7d.price arrays when sparkline=true.

evidence.description: fresh-rerun-summary.json captures ordered id lists, monotonicity checks, and sparkline field-presence comparisons from the fresh validation API run.
